n: Icewind Dale in EET Party Banter

dependencies.reason: Extends IWD area scripts (ID1001.bcs, etc.) created by IWD-in-EET

sum: This mod adds interjections and area comments to every base companion in both BG1 and BG2 (including Beamdog NPCs) to the IWD campaign with the mod IWD1-IWD2-EET.
no: This mod adds interjections and area comments to every base companion in both BG1 and BG2 (including Beamdog NPCs) to the IWD campaign with the mod IWD1-IWD2-EET.
